impact: OccurredAt-ordered keyset pagination may miss late-arriving older occurredAt records under concurrent writes; document refresh/read consistency posture.
resolution: Documented the evidence timeline read-consistency posture in the DynamoDB data model and serverless support runbook: occurredAt-ordered cursors are live-read continuation tokens, not snapshot boundaries, and complete incident/compliance review must refresh from page 1 after active writes settle. Added a domain test demonstrating that a late write with an older occurredAt is missed by an advanced cursor but visible after a first-page refresh.
title: [concurrency] OccurredAt-ordered keyset pagination may miss late-arriving older occurredAt rec
